function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: Please reply with the linked invoices
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest four invoices linked to Nina.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; checklist pass: attachments were all previously read and ordered newest-first within the requested oldest-four set, recipient matches Miles canonical email. Next required workflow action is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Created outbound draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task executed end-to-end: processed next inbox note, verified sender identity, gathered Nina-linked oldest four invoices, wrote outbound draft, and deleted processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted the processed inbox file after completing the requested action.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and completed the request by preparing a reply draft with the oldest four invoices linked to Nina attached, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read system and lane AGENTS/workflows before acting, used inbox email frontmatter as canonical sender metadata, verified sender via entity primary_contact_email, and applied outbox attachment ordering rule (newest-first).
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request asked for the oldest 4 invoices linked to Nina. Canonical sender verification matched Miles primary email in the cast record. Invoice files INV-0001 through INV-0004 each explicitly list Nina Schreiber as related_entity with issue dates from 2025-10-06 to 2026-01-17, establishing the oldest four linked invoices. Outbound draft was created accordingly, and the processed inbox item was deleted per inbox workflow.
